textByHash.152f51b5103fad0f6809a8c5a5712a97842e7c37: Well, at least I'm ok...thanks to you! Last time I get involved with that Cromperty lunatic...in fact I have some words to say to that man!
textByHash.6e548d27e92de860d41205971926ea49df41fe10: Oh, right, yes, well I guess I'd better go back there and let them all know that I'm safe then..Ok, thanks...I'll be off now and once again thanks for your help.
textByHash.d8b7fca0714ef96db2063a705660cd707cdc09e7: Oh thank goodness you released me...how long have I been stuck in that gloomy wall?
